mechanism: Morality is reduced to what people endorse verbally
possible_dampener: Study motivation action follow-through and repair

mechanism: Moral talk is mistaken for moral reliability
possible_dampener: Test conduct under cost ambiguity and pressure

mechanism: Social or institutional pressure blocks action
possible_dampener: Protect dissent clarify responsibility and reduce retaliation risk

mechanism: The self redescribes failure as acceptable
possible_dampener: Use motive checks affected-person perspective and accountability

mechanism: Emotion motivates action but in distorted or disproportionate ways
possible_dampener: Interpret and regulate guilt shame anger compassion and disgust

mechanism: Moral self-image protects itself against evidence of failure
Past good conduct licenses present laxity
possible_dampener: Reject moral credit logic and evaluate present responsibility
Protect rest workload pacing and decision bandwidth

mechanism: Institutions state values while rewarding contrary behavior
possible_dampener: Align incentives metrics and accountability with stated values

mechanism: Shame or fear blocks apology correction and restitution
possible_dampener: Use concrete repair routines and follow-through mechanisms
